essential_assertions.text: assert forall|c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int| #![auto] 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b && is_valid_window(a as int, b as int, c1, r1, c2, r2) && window_avoids_dead(c1, r1,
assert(window_area(0, 0, (a - 1) as int, (y - 1) as int) == y * a) by(nonlinear_arith) requires y >= 1, a >= 1;
assert(x + 1 <= a - 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires v3 > 0, v3 == (a - x - 1) * b, b >= 1, 0 <= x < a;
assert(y + 1 <= b - 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires v4 > 0, v4 == (b - y - 1) * a, a >= 1, 0 <= y < b;
assert(window_area(0, (y + 1) as int, (a - 1) as int, (b - 1) as int) == (b - y - 1) * a) by(nonlinear_arith) requires y + 1 <= b - 1, a >= 1;

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int| #![auto] 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b && is_valid_window(a as int, b as int, c1, r1, c2, r2) && window_avoids_dead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x as int, y as int) implies window_area(c1, r1, c2, r2) <= area by { window_bound_lemma(a as int, b as int, c1, r1, c2, r2, x as int, y as int);
assert(window_area(0, 0, (a - 1) as int, (y - 1) as int) == y * a) by(nonlinear_arith) requires y >= 1, a >= 1;
assert(x + 1 <= a - 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires v3 > 0, v3 == (a - x - 1) * b, b >= 1, 0 <= x < a;
assert(y + 1 <= b - 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires v4 > 0, v4 == (b - y - 1) * a, a >= 1, 0 <= y < b;
assert(window_area(0, (y + 1) as int, (a - 1) as int, (b - 1) as int) == (b - y - 1) * a) by(nonlinear_arith) requires y + 1 <= b - 1, a >= 1;
